description: To install new rooftop rack for mechanical equipment, per Architecture Committee approval of 03/26/2024, Vieux Carre Commission approval of 04/17/2024, and materials stamped VCC approved 06/21/2024. Work includes: • Installation of an approximately 36’ x 10’metal grate mechanical rack • Installation of screening around mechanical rack rising approximately 4’ above the metal grating • Screening to consist of 1” x 2” horizontal wood slats on the exterior side of the screening and sound panels on the interior side

description: Alteration of existing ferry terminal building, ferry approach and surrounding site. Overhead canopy for weather protection to be added to existing ferry approach bridge. Surrounding site, including the public right-of-way, will be renovated to create a new plaza area with new stairs and accessible sloped walks to the terminal building. All work to be done as per plans. *FINAL INSPECTION* FEMA EC BFE +20.32 NAVD
